base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of samus_facing_screen_death — a character (playable) from 1986 metroid. Death pose — Samus facing camera (unique pose used only on death). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Death pose — Samus facing camera (unique pose used only on death); 6-frame progression (helmet-reveal → fade/explode). Triggered on 0-HP; continues to game-over
